name: Blessing
desc:
Target friendly creature deals +{0}% Damage with basic attacks. 
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Haste
desc:
Target friendly creature gains +{0} Speed.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Healing Water
desc:
Target friendly creature restores {0} HP.
Cannot revive fallen units.

name: Shorten Shadow
desc:
Target enemy creature loses {0} Attack and Defense.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Favorable Wind
desc:
Target friendly creature deals +{0}% Damage with Ranged and Long Reach attacks.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: From a Bird’s Eye
desc: Reveals the borders of all areas, including those hidden by the fog of war.

name: Inner Light
desc: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to the target friendly creature by {0}.

name: Weakening Ray
desc: Removes {0} counterattack charge(s) from the target enemy for this round.

name: Arina’s Touch
desc:
Target friendly creature gains {0} Initiative and {1}% maximum HP.
Duration: {2} round(s).

name: Riposte
desc:
Target friendly creature counterattacks before enemy attack lands.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Song of Power
desc: Resets the cooldowns of the target friendly creature.

name: Taunt
desc:
All enemies within {0} hexes from the target friendly creature can only target that creature. Each instance of Damage makes the effect last {2} round(s) shorter.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Clear Fog
desc: Reveals {0} squares around the selected space on the global map up to {1} square(s) away from the hero. Usable {2} time(s) per day.

name: Heavenly Blades
desc:
Target friendly creature deals +{0} Pure Damage with each basic attack and restores the same amount of HP. Cannot revive fallen units.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Radiant Armor
desc:
Target friendly creature takes –{0}% Damage from all sources.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Vengeance
desc:
Whenever an enemy attacks target friendly creature in Melee, that enemy takes {0} Magic Damage. 
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Arina’s Chosen
desc:
Target friendly creature cannot have less than {0}% of their current units. Taking Damage reduces the duration of the effect by {2} round(s).
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Judgement
desc: Strikes target enemy four times, dealing a total of {0} Magic Damage.

name: Despair
desc:
Curses the target enemy. Cursed creatures take {0} Pure Damage at the start of their turn. This effect is stackable. 
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Enlarge Shadow
desc:
Target friendly creature gains {0} Attack and Defense.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Fatal Decay
desc:
Target enemy creature cannot restore HP. This effect remains after the creature’s death.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Unnatural Calm
desc:
Target enemy deals –{0}% Damage with basic attacks. 
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Read Minds
desc: Reveals the precise number and intentions of all neutral squads within {0} squares of the hero.

name: Shade Cloak
desc: Target friendly creature cannot be targeted. Effect ends when the unit takes any action or at the end of the round.

name: Umbral Grip
desc: Deals {0} Pure Damage to the target enemy. This Damage cannot be modified in any way.

name: Web
desc:
Target enemy creature loses {0} Speed
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Naira’s Veil
desc: Renews the fog of war in a {0}‑square radius around the hero, concealing them from opponents until the fog is re‑cleared. Usable {1} time(s) per day.

name: Silence
desc:
Target enemy creature is prevented from using abilities or generating Focus Points.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Sleep
desc:
Target enemy creature falls asleep and cannot take any actions. Dispelled upon taking Damage. After awakening, the same creature cannot fall asleep again until the end of the battle. 
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Twilight
desc:
Target enemy creature is prevented from using Ranged attacks.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Berserk
desc: Target creature immediately and uncontrollably attacks the closest target within its attack radius, whether it is a friendly or enemy creature.

name: Summon Starchild
desc: Summons a stack of {0} Starchildren on an adjacent free hex. They will disappear at the end of the battle.

name: Vulnerability
desc:
Target enemy creature takes +{0}% Damage from all sources.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Coup de Grâce
desc:
Target enemy creature will die after taking any Damage if its stack size is lower than or equal to {0}% of its original number.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Naira’s Kiss
desc:
Marks the target enemy creature. Marked creatures take {1} Magic Damage whenever they perform any action.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Shadow Army
desc: Increases the number of units in the target friendly stack by {0}%. These units are temporary and cannot exceed {1}% of the current number of permanent units in the stack.

name: Early Start
desc:
Target friendly creature gains +{0} Initiative.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Energize
desc: Immediately generates {0} Focus Charge(s).

name: Guillotine
desc: Deals {0}% of target enemy creature’s maximum HP as Magic Damage. Each time this spell is re‑cast on the same target, it deals +{1}% more Damage. This effect is stackable.

name: Optical Illusion
desc:
Target friendly creature takes –{0}% Ranged Damage.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Blink
desc: Teleports a target friendly creature up to {0} hexes from its current hex.

name: Carapace
desc:
Shields a target friendly creature with a barrier that blocks the next instance of Damage.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Energy Explosion
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage per Focus Charge to all creatures in one‑hex radius.

name: Reinforcements
desc: The casting hero immediately interacts with any external dwelling you control within {0} squares. Usable {1} times per day.

name: Assemble!
desc: The casting hero immediately interacts with any allied hero within {0} squares. Usable {1} times per day.

name: Impending Fate
desc: Deals Damage to all enemies. Each stack takes {0} Magic Damage per its creature tier

name: Shackles
desc:
Target enemy creature cannot counterattack.
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Temporal Spheres
desc:
Place up to {1} invisible traps on free hexes. Traps trigger when stepped on by a ground creature, dealing Pure Damage to the creature and adjacent ones before disappearing. The Damage equals {0}% of one unit’s maximum HP.
Duration: {2} round(s).

name: Mirror Copy
desc:
Summons a copy of a target friendly creature. The copy deals –{0}% and takes +{1}% Damage and can’t use special abilities.
Duration: {2} round(s).

name: Rewind Life
desc:
Restore {0} HP to a target friendly creature.
This can revive fallen units.

name: Spatial Snare
desc: Place up to {1} invisible trap(s) on free hexes. Traps trigger when a ground creature moves through them, halting the creature’s movement, ending its current turn and cancelling its next turn. After triggering, the trap disappears. If the trapped hex is the creature’s final destination, the trap does not trigger. Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Black Hole
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to all creatures on the target hex and up to 2 hexes away in every direction. Pulls the furthest affected targets towards the center if possible.

name: Doreath’s Tide
desc:
All friendly creatures gain {0} Speed and Initiative. All enemies lose {0} Speed and Initiative.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Reality Distortion
desc:
Selected target takes no Damage from any source. Instead, at the start of each round, it takes all Damage that it would have taken in the previous round as Pure Damage. 
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Groundsight
desc: Reveals the location of all neutral squads on the global map (including those in the fog of war).

name: Lightning Bolt
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to target enemy creature.

name: Thick Hide
desc:
Target friendly creature takes –{0}% Damage from Melee attacks.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Crystal Crown
desc:
Place up to {1} crystal obstacles. An obstacle is destroyed upon taking {0} hit(s) from attacks.
Duration: {2} round(s).

name: Fireball
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to all creatures in a 1‑hex radius.

name: Ice Bolt
desc:
Deals {0} Magic Damage to target enemy creature and reduces their Initiative by {1}.
Duration: {2} round(s).

name: Wean
desc: Reduces the duration of all positive effects applied to the target by {0}.

name: Cave In
desc:
Deals {0} Magic Damage to the target enemy. All adjacent empty hexes are filled with rock obstacles. An obstacle is destroyed upon taking {2} hit(s) from attacks.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Earth’s Rage
desc: Deals {0} Damage to all defensive structures on the battlefield. Also deals {1} Damage to all creatures within castle walls.

name: Firewall
desc:
Burns {2} selected hexes. A ground creature that steps onto a burning hex takes {0} Magic Damage.
Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Stone Fangs
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to up to {1} different target enemies.

name: Anti‑Magic
desc:
Any chosen target becomes immune to spells of tier {1} and lower. This effect cannot be dispelled. If the target is a summoned creature or contains temporary units in its stack, those are destroyed. 
Duration: {0} round(s).

name: Chain Lightning
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to the target enemy creature. The lightning then jumps {2} time(s) to a random target within {3} hex(es), dealing –{1}% Damage with each jump.

name: Circle of Winter
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to all creatures adjacent to target hex. All affected stacks are pushed away from the center if possible.

name: Primordial Chaos
desc: Affects a neutral squad in a {0}‑square radius. Transforms it into a different squad of the same strength. Usable {1} time(s) per day.

name: Armageddon
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to all creatures on the battlefield.

name: Hksmilla’s Rampage
desc: Target friendly creature gains Double Strike and deals and takes +{0}% Damage. Duration: {1} round(s).

name: Summon Primal Remnant
desc: Summons a stack of {0} Primal Remnants. They will disappear at the end of the battle.

name: Back to Foothold!
desc: Teleports the casting hero to a selected Remote Foothold you control. Usable {0} time(s) per day.

name: Back to Town!
desc: Teleports the casting hero to the nearest city you control within {0} squares. All remaining movement points are lost. Usable {1} time(s) per day.

name: Dispel Summon
desc: Immediately dispels target enemy summoned creature.

name: Dusk Dampening
desc: The enemy hero’s next spell costs +{0}% mana and gains a –{0}% Spell Power malus.

name: Magic Arrow
desc: Deals {0} Magic Damage to a target enemy creature.

name: Mana Rite
desc: Restores the casting hero’s mana based on their remaining movement points: {0}% of mana per {1}% of remaining points. All movement points are lost.

name: Mana Transfusion
desc: Removes {2} mana from the casting hero to restore {3} mana to any allied hero within {0} squares. Usable {1} time(s) per day.

name: Necromancer Will
desc: Allows raising Undead to be toggled on or off. When it is off, the hero restores Necromantic Energy after winning a battle instead of raising friendly Undead.

name: Relocation
desc: The casting hero immediately interacts with any controlled city, enabling the transfer of creatures to or from that city. Usable {0} time per day.

name: Spell Eruption
desc: The casting hero’s next spell costs –{0}% mana and gains a +{0}% Spell Power bonus.

name: Pocket Dimension
desc: Creates an entrance to a Foothold on an adjacent space that lasts until the end of the day, allowing any allied hero to leave creatures and artifacts there. If an enemy hero interacts with the entrance, it disappears. Usable {0} time(s) per day.

name: Second Wind
desc: Immediately restores {0} Movement points to the hero. Usable {1} time(s) per day.

name: Shadowflight
desc: Grants the hero the ability to fly, moving freely through any obstacles on the global map. Flying above obstacles costs +{0}% Movement points.

name: Town Portal
desc: Teleports the casting hero to a selected city you control. Usable {0} times per day.

name: Dimension Door
desc: Teleports the hero to target location within {0} squares. Usable {1} times per day.

name: Gate of Light
desc: Creates a portal until the end of the day, allowing any hero to travel through it. Entry is from any free adjacent space, and exit is to any free space within {0} square(s) of the hero. {1} time(s) per day.
